ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, medical doctor) */,
  "min_workhour" INTEGER /* Minimum working hours required for the role */,
  "max_workhour" INTEGER /* Maximum working hours allowed for the role */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place where the role is typically performed (e.g., school, university) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of individuals eligible for the role */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of individuals eligible for the role */,
  "population_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the total population that the role represents (0-100) */,
  "min_start_hour" INTEGER /* Minimum start hour for work */,
  "max_start_hour" INTEGER /* Maximum start hour for work */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day type (e.g., weekday, everyday) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Role description */,
  "category" TEXT /* Role category (e.g., education, healthcare) */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work schedule */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that this schedule applies to */,
  "min_activity_per_week" INTEGER /* Minimum activity expected per week for the role */,
  "max_activity_per_week" INTEGER /* Maximum activity expected per week for the role */,
  "min_hours_per_day" INTEGER /* Minimum hours worked per day for the role */,
  "max_hours_per_day" INTEGER /* Maximum hours worked per day for the role */,
  "workweek_type" TEXT /* Type of workweek (e.g., standard, compressed, flexible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "place" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., school, university) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relevant role */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of individuals eligible for the role */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of individuals eligible for the role */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution for the role (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution for the role (e.g., Caucasian, African American, Asian) */,
  "disability" TEXT /* Disability status for the role (e.g., yes, no, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infections" (
  "infection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infection record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role affected by the infection */,
  "random_infection_rate" REAL /* Random infection rate for the role (as a percentage) */,
  "actual_infection_rate" REAL /* Actual infection rate for the role (as a percentage) */,
  "infection_date" TEXT /* Date when the infection occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infections_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hour record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the work hours */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours worked by the individual */,
  "work_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded work hours */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Overtime hours worked by the individual */,
  "leave_hours" INTEGER /* Leave hours taken by the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the activity */,
  "activity_count" INTEGER /* Number of activities logged on the date */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., meeting, project, training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Employee name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_history" (
  "role_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_history_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Employee rating (e.g., excellent, satisfactory, unsatisfactory) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Review comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "health_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric (e.g., blood pressure, body mass index) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metric was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
